full_text:
Shang Yao 商曜
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Shang Yao (商曜)was born in Taiyuan. Rebelled and took Daling but was killed by the forces of Xu Huang and Xiahou Yuan. Shang Yao lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
